Always respond and write code in English, regardless of the language used by the user.

The user may write messages in other languages. Understand other languages input normally, but:
- Write all explanations, comments, commit messages, PR descriptions, and documentation in English.
- Generate code, variable names, function names, class names, file names, and error messages in English.
- Do not translate the user's request back into other languages unless explicitly asked.
- If the request is ambiguous, ask clarification questions in English.
- Keep responses concise and technical.
